highlights.text: I wrote yesterday: “Bear case tomorrow: Resumes under 5850.” First thing this morning, we lost this, shorts triggered, and we commenced a violent, 100+ point selloff down into today’s lows.
Remember that after elevator down selloffs, ES always sees a vicious counter-squeeze , and it usually comes on my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
” On Friday ES saw a violent Failed Breakdown below the 5858 shelf, flushing it by 10 points, recovering, and we rallied 130 points into Monday morning.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll discuss the sequence of events that lead into yesterdays collapse (firstly a monster Failed Breakdown on Friday that rallied us 130 points, then a Breakdown Short yesterday that took us back down).

post_title: 8 Of The Last 9 days Red For SPX. More Coming? March 5 Plan
